transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: Concrete illustrations survive, but summaries, headings, questions, and conclusions arrive in scrambled succession; logical references lose their antecedents, and the chapter finishes by backing into its opening apparatus.
paraphrased_evidence.B: A forceful progression moves from shame through conditioning, social influence, compulsion, and failed restriction toward an actionable mindset, supported by vivid everyday examples despite some late repetition and promotional overstatement.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Coherent causal sequencing lets each example answer the preceding question and prepare the next claim; disrupted ordering turns the same materials into isolated assertions without accumulating narrative or argumentative pressure.
